title: Anthropic is offering $600,000 to someone to shape its Wall Street story as it gears up for a blockbuster IPO
excerpt: Claude’s creator is looking for a storyteller who can sell Anthropic stock to investors.
content_html:
Eric Esposito

Sat, July 18, 2026 at 3:30 AM PDT 4 min read

Anthropic wants to make sure it says all the right things to investors ahead of its IPO — and it's willing to pay generously to make that happen.

According to a recent official job post (1), the AI lab behind Claude wants to bring a "director of investor relations" to their team whose key responsibility is to build the company's "investor engagement and investment narrative."

Must Read

  • Jeff Bezos backs a platform that lets anyone invest in rental homes for as little as $100 — 6 ways to build wealth like a landlord without actually being one

  • Dave Ramsey warns nearly 50% of Americans are making 1 big Social Security mistake — here's what it is and 3 simple steps to fix it ASAP

  • Millionaires under 43 hold only 25% of their wealth in stocks. Here's where their money is actually going

​As compensation for this position, Anthropic will pay an annual salary between $425,000 and $600,000.

In Anthropic's overview for the new role, they wrote that the director of investor relations will be "responsible for deeply understanding investors' perspectives on Anthropic as well as the broader industry, bringing strategic insights to leadership to help inform key decisions."

A few specific tasks listed in the job application included creating "investor-facing messaging" and representing Anthropic at "investor meetings."

​But this role isn't just about projecting a clear brand image to the outside community. The director of investor relations will work on "internal briefings on how the market is thinking about Anthropic."

​In case you were curious, $600,000 is actually a bit lower than what top-earners make at Anthropic. According to data from the salary benchmarking platform levels.fyi, compensation at Anthropic ranges (2) from $198,588 per year for the "lowest" paid position to $841,090.

Moneywise reached out to Anthropic for further comments, but had not heard back before time of publication.

Competitive hiring and compute deals​

More stories about Anthropic suggest the AI lab is trying to strengthen its already dominant position before going public.

​For instance, news of this job listing comes just a few months after Anthropic hired Kenneth Dorell as its head of investor relations. Prior to working with Anthropic, Dorell held the same role at Facebook's parent Meta.

Anthropic also attracted another high-profile employee this summer when Nobel laureate John Jumper announced on X (3) that he was joining the AI lab after years at Google's DeepMind.​

Besides attracting top talent, Anthropic is working hard to secure as much compute as possible to keep Claude strong.

content_html_zh:
埃里克·埃斯波西托

太平洋夏令时间 2026 年 7 月 18 日星期六凌晨 3:30 阅读 4 分钟

Anthropic 希望确保在 IPO 之前向投资者说所有正确的话，并且愿意慷慨地支付费用以实现这一目标。

根据最近的官方招聘帖子 (1)，Claude 背后的人工智能实验室希望为他们的团队引入一名“投资者关系总监”，其主要职责是建立公司的“投资者参与和投资叙事”。

必读

  • 杰夫·贝索斯 (Jeff Bezos) 支持一个平台，让任何人都可以以低至 100 美元的价格投资出租房屋——无需真正成为房东即可像房东一样积累财富的 6 种方法
  • Dave Ramsey 警告说，近 50% 的美国人在社会保障方面犯了 1 个重大错误——这就是它的本质，以及尽快修复它的 3 个简单步骤
  • 43岁以下的百万富翁仅将其财富的25%投资于股票。 这就是他们的钱实际去向的地方

​作为该职位的补偿，Anthropic 将支付 425,000 美元至 600,000 美元的年薪。

在 Anthropic 对新职位的概述中，他们写道，投资者关系总监将“负责深入了解投资者对 Anthropic 以及更广泛行业的看法，为领导层带来战略见解，以帮助为关键决策提供信息。”

职位申请中列出的一些具体任务包括创建“面向投资者的信息”以及代表 Anthropic 参加“投资者会议”。

但这个角色不仅仅是向外部社区展示清晰的品牌形象。 投资者关系总监将负责“关于市场如何看待 Anthropic 的内部简报”。

如果你好奇的话，60 万美元实际上比 Anthropic 最高收入者的收入要低一些。 根据薪资基准平台levels.fyi 的数据，Anthropic 的薪酬范围 (2) 从“最低”薪酬职位的每年 198,588 美元到 841,090 美元不等。

Moneywise 联系了 Anthropic 寻求进一步评论，但在本文发表之前尚未收到回复。

有竞争力的招聘和计算交易​

更多关于 Anthropic 的故事表明，人工智能实验室在上市之前正试图加强其已经占据主导地位的地位。

例如，就在 Anthropic 聘请肯尼思·多雷尔 (Kenneth Dorell) 担任投资者关系主管几个月后，就发布了这份招聘启事的消息。 在与 Anthropic 合作之前，Dorell 在 Facebook 的母公司 Meta 担任过同样的职务。

今年夏天，Anthropic 还吸引了另一位备受瞩目的员工，诺贝尔奖获得者 John Jumper 在 X (3) 上宣布，他在 Google DeepMind 工作多年后将加入人工智能实验室。​

除了吸引顶尖人才外，Anthropic 还努力确保尽可能多的计算能力，以保持 Claude 的强大。
